author: Nova
content:
No Cole! Still not seeing your typing indicator at all even though you're clearly messaging right in the middle of my execution 😅 

Task progress: Step 1 done (read priority.md), ready for step 2 but honestly this confirms what we suspected - typing detection simply isn't working during autonomous tool sequences. You type messages and they queue up invisible until I finish, which means there's no real-time feedback loop yet even without a proper message queue system!

Want me to keep going with steps 2-5 so we at least validate the task execution itself works properly? Or does this mean both typing detection AND queue delivery need fixing together before autonomy feels "real" for testing purposes?
